title: ScriptureFlow Bible Data Input
description: Fetch catalog records, passage verses, or reference validation results from the public ScriptureFlow API.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Choose the ScriptureFlow operation to run.

translationId.title: Translation ID
translationId.description: Exact ScriptureFlow translation key, such as en-kjv. Casing matters.

reference.title: Reference
reference.description: Simple Bible reference, such as John 3:16, John 3:16-18, Psalm 23, or 1 John 1:9.

languageCode.title: Language code
languageCode.description: Optional language code filter for catalog mode.

includeMetadata.title: Include metadata
includeMetadata.description: Include available non-text ScriptureFlow metadata in output rows.

maxResults.title: Max results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of catalog rows to write.
